name: FastBill API
description: FastBill is a cloud app for German invoicing & accounting. The API uses a single POST endpoint with action-based services for managing customers, invoices, contacts, estimates, recurring invoices, revenues, expenses, articles, projects, time tracking, documents, templates, and webhooks.
